content:
Ultra space incorrectly records Helot: Catena's card Crimson Shackles/Bloodthirsty Flail.
I cant pinpoint the exact issue but sometimes if the 1st card played in a round is Bloodthirsty Flail, Ultra space instead of Locking into a slot the card in the same state will lock in Crimson Shackles at stage 2/3 echo. Unfortunately when i tried to replicate the bug while recording the screen it didn't occur, but in my experience its quite frequent. In an attached screenshot, the right most slot of the ultra space is selected right after playing a Bloodthirsty Flail as a first card in a turn.
Moreover, similar bug occurs the other way around and pretty consistently. If a card Crimson Shackles at a stage 2/3 echo is played as a first card in the round, which locks them into Ultra Space, the slot will lock in Bloodthirsty Flail instead. Recording showcasing it is the 2d attached file, time stamps 1:03 and 1:38 are highlighting the bug. Video replicating the bug is also uploaded on drobox if quality allowed by discord is proven to be insufficient: https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/emnjxjuzhe5ss462sfcnf/2025-08-02-23-04-54-76.mp4?rlkey=v95gm6ww2i4jwbom3f698s24z&st=t9r50x1l&dl=0
thread_title: 💭「Processing」Helot: Catena - inconsistent interactions with ultra space - Crimson Shackles

content: 能不能讓命輪和鑰令用給對方目標使用，好測試部分命輪與鑰令的效果和bug。
